pattern:nestjs+mongodb:app-module.content: // app.module.ts MongoDB: MongooseModule.forRoot(process.env.MONGODB_URI||'mongodb://localhost:27017/app'). ONLY add modules that exist. NOT JwtModule/Redis/Kafka unless requested.

pattern:nestjs:dto.content: // dto.ts: import {PartialType} from '@nestjs/mapped-types' (NEVER @nestjs/common). export class UpdateBookDto extends PartialType(CreateBookDto) {}

self:nestjs:dto-partialtype:missing.content:
COMMON MISTAKE in nestjs:
Generated code was MISSING: @IsString
Prompt was: Generate NestJS DTOs for Book entity.
CreateBookDto with title, author (required strings) and description (optional string).
UpdateBookDto extends PartialType(CreateBookDto) from '@nestjs/mapped-types
CORRECT approach must include: PartialType, @nestjs/mapped-types, @IsString, UpdateBookDto
